transcription.text: Mustard. Bread. No. Pickles. No. Wax paper. Wax paper? I don't think I have any in the house. Well how could you pack lunches without it? With Handy Wrap. It's a snack. With Handy Wrap. What's Handy Wrap? Just the clear new sandwich wrap everyone's using. Keep sandwiches fresh even overnight. See, Handy Wrap locks freshness in. Come on. I'll prove it. I'll pour scalding hot coffee into this cup lined with Handy Wrap. Be careful it'll leak. Not Handy Wrap. But imagine what would happen with wax paper. I hate to. Now you know why Handy Wrap keeps lunches fresh even when you make them the night before. Why Handy Wrap costs so little. I use it by the yard instead of wax paper. Handy Wrap.
